title: save_post action payload
description: WP-compat save_post action. After the wpcompat adapter runs, plugin handlers see a single WPPost-shaped object: {ID, Post, Update}.

Post.description: Native post payload (caller-supplied type from packages/go/posts). Plugin authors should not assume a fixed shape — pass through to native handlers.

Update.description: true when this is an update of an existing post, false for an insert.
